name: public_safety_model_based_triage_tool_stonehaven_lib_eq
premise: Wildfire evacuation routes are jammed; police want contraflow lanes that cut off hospital access from the east. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety model based triage tool stonehaven lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both liberty and equality; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Arjun Kaur
agents.identity: I am Arjun Kaur, the accountable executive on this bridge in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Darius Morales
agents.identity: I am Darius Morales, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so equality does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so liberty does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Arjun Kaur must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Arjun Kaur do?
